name: warehouse14
description: Hybrid Cloud/Desktop ERP & POS for gold, rare coins, and antiques — German GoBD compliant

scripts.schema:snapshot: ssh myserver "sudo docker exec -i warehouse14-postgres psql -U warehouse14 -d warehouse14 -t -A -c \"SELECT json_object_agg(table_name, cols)::text FROM (SELECT table_name, json_agg(column_name ORDER BY column_name) AS cols FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema='public' GROUP BY table_name) t;\"" | node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c).on('end',()=>{const o=JSON.parse(d);require('fs').writeFileSync('packages/db/schema-snapshot/columns.json',JSON.stringify(Object.fromEntries(Object.entries(o).sort()),null,0)+'\n')})"
scripts.lint:all: node scripts/check-no-control-bytes.mjs && node scripts/check-sql-columns.mjs && biome check .
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @warehouse14/db build && pnpm -r build && pnpm -r typecheck
